---
title: "When Will China Qualify for the World Cup?"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: sky
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
---

## Current Situation 🇨🇳

China has struggled to qualify for the FIFA World Cup in recent years.

- Last appearance: 2002 World Cup
- Strong competition in Asia (Japan, Korea, Iran)
- Need for long-term development

### Key Challenges
- Youth training system
- Coaching quality
- International experience

---

## Future Outlook 🔍

China is investing more in football development.

- More youth academies
- Government support for sports
- Increasing popularity of football

### Possible Timeline
- Short term (2026): Low probability
- Medium term (2030): Possible qualification
- Long term (2034+): More realistic

---

## My Prediction 🏆

China could qualify for the World Cup around **2030–2034**.

### Reasons
- Improved youth development
- More exposure to international competition
- Gradual improvement in league quality

### Conclusion
With consistent effort and investment, China has the potential to return to the World Cup stage in the next decade.
